name: @agent-desktop-harness/cli
description: CLI smoke and utility commands for agent-desktop-harness.

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @agent-desktop-harness/core build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node dist/index.js
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @agent-desktop-harness/core build && pnpm build && node --test dist/doctor.test.js dist/smoke.test.js dist/httpSmoke.test.js dist/mcpSmoke.test.js dist/browser.test.js dist/viteSmoke.test.js dist/annotationRepairSmoke.test.js
